metadata.name: Manage Closed Captioning for Live Stream

description: An agent must ensure real-time closed captioning is working correctly for a live streamed press conference.

nodes.task_description: Connect the live audio feed to the automated real-time captioning service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sets up the connection.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the live captions for accuracy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent watches the captions and makes minor corrections to names and technical terms in real time.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the captions are properly embedded in the final live stream.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the captions are appearing correctly for viewers.
